parameters.content:
AI Data Transformer – CRM Record Builder

🎯 Objective
Convert messy free-text inquiry into a structured CRM-ready record.

🧱 Requirements
Simulate a business inquiry message.
Use AI to extract structured fields.
Return a clean JSON object ready for API use.

📤 Expected Behavior
Your workflow should extract:
Company name
Contact name
Email
User counts
Services requested
Timeline
Inquiry type

If a field is missing, handle it gracefully.
Do not manually parse the string.

⭐ Bonus
Add a validation step:
If email is missing → route for manual review.

values.content:
=transform {{ $json.message }} into JSON format:
{
"Company Name": {{$json.company_name}},
"Contact Name": {{$json.contact_name}},
"Contact Email": {{$json.email}},
"User Counts": {{$json.user_counts}},
"Services Requested": {{$json.services_requested}},
"Timeline": {{$json.timeline}},
"Inquiry": {{$json.inquiry_type}}

make sure the JSON is in a valid format with proper opening and closing curly braces
strictly do a JSON output and do not include any outside text
